title: Overview Absolute Accuracy Calibration
description:
Overview Absolute Accuracy Calibration

Overview

Differences in ideal robot performance and actual robot performance are caused by mechanical errors and the robot's structure. Absolute accuracy calibration compensates for these differences to ensure that the actual position and trajectory of the robot match the coordinates and trajectory specified.

Using absolute accuracy calibration to improve robot accuracy is expected to provide the following benefits.

Reduce
	 the number of teaching points required

High-precision
	 assembly

Reduction
	 of start-up time during restoration
